input: Generate a branded HTML landing page for our product launch
expected_behavior: Skill activates, reads brand config, and produces self-contained HTML with CSS variables from brand tokens, hero section, responsive grid, navigation with wordmark, and WCAG AA contrast compliance

input: Build a brand-compliant web page with a dark hero section and stat blocks
expected_behavior: Skill activates with dark hero template (black bg, primary accent on key word, white text), stat blocks with primary-color left border, and proper color combination from approved palette

input: Create an HTML page but I don't have any brand configuration
expected_behavior: Skill activates with neutral defaults (#2563EB primary, #F8FAFC background, system fonts), produces valid responsive HTML, and adds comment noting customization is available via brand config

input: Generate a branded HTML page for our Arabic-language content
expected_behavior: Skill activates, adds dir='rtl' to html element, mirrors layout accordingly, and maintains brand token compliance with RTL-appropriate styling

input: Generate a branded Word document for our quarterly report
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate. This is a Word/DOCX generation request. Should route to brand-docx skill instead.
